SEARCH
Package structs.list

Class LinkedList<T>

java.lang.Object
structs.list.LinkedList<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the generic representing the data held by the list
All Implemented Interfaces:
List<T>
public class LinkedList<T> extends Object implements List<T>
A Singly Linked List with a dummy head node and a tail pointer

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LinkedList()
    initializes the linked list with a dummy head node, a tail pointing to said head node, and a size of 0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(T toAdd)
    the add(I toAdd) method adds the given element to the end of the list
    void
    add(T toAdd, int index)
    the add(I toAdd, int index) method adds the given element at the given index
    void
    addFirst(T toAdd)
    adds the given element to the beginning of the list
    void
    clear()
    the clear() method removes all elements in the list
    boolean
    contains(T element)
    the contains(I element) method returns true if the given argument is in the list, and false otherwise
    T
    get(int index)
    the get(int index) method returns the data at the given index
    T
    getTail()
    the getTail() method returnst the value of the last Node in the list
    int
    indexOf(T element)
    the indexOf(I element) method returns the index of the first instance of the passed element
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    the isEmpty() method returns true if the list contains no elements
    int
    lastIndexOf(T element)
    the lastIndexOf(I element) method returns the index of the last copy of the given element in the list
    T
    remove(int index)
    the remove(int index) method removes the element at the given index
    int
    remove(T element)
    the remove(I element) method removes the first occurance of the given element if it is present
    int
    size()
    the size() method returns the size of the list
    LinkedList<T>
    subList(int fromIndex, int toIndex)
    the subList(int fromIndex, int toIndex) method returns a sublist from the first given index to the last given index inclusive
    String
    toString()
     

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • LinkedList

      public LinkedList()
      initializes the linked list with a dummy head node, a tail pointing to said head node, and a size of 0

    • add

      public void add(T toAdd)
      Description copied from interface: List
      the add(I toAdd) method adds the given element to the end of the list

    • add

      public void add(T toAdd, int index)
      Description copied from interface: List
      the add(I toAdd, int index) method adds the given element at the given index
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      toAdd - - the element to be added
      index - - the index where the element will be added

      public void addFirst(T toAdd)
      Description copied from interface: List
      adds the given element to the beginning of the list

      addFirst in interface List<T>
      Parameters:
      toAdd - - the element to be added

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Description copied from interface: List
      the clear() method removes all elements in the list
      Specified by:
      clear in interface List<T>

    • contains

      public boolean contains(T element)
      Description copied from interface: List
      the contains(I element) method returns true if the given argument is in the list, and false otherwise
      Specified by:
      contains in interface List<T>
      Parameters:
      element - - the element that we are looking for in the list
      Returns:
      - returns true if the element is in the list at least once, and false if it does not

    • get

      public T get(int index) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Description copied from interface: List
      the get(int index) method returns the data at the given index
      Specified by:
      get in interface List<T>
      Parameters:
      index - - the index we are getting data from
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException

    • getTail

      public T getTail()
      the getTail() method returnst the value of the last Node in the list
      Returns:
      the last Node in the list

    • indexOf

      public int indexOf(T element)
      Description copied from interface: List
      the indexOf(I element) method returns the index of the first instance of the passed element
      Specified by:
      indexOf in interface List<T>
      Parameters:
      element - - the element being searched for
      Returns:
      - the index of the element being searched for, -1 if it isn't in the list

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Description copied from interface: List
      the isEmpty() method returns true if the list contains no elements
      Specified by:
      isEmpty in interface List<T>
      Returns:
      - true if empty, false if not

    • lastIndexOf

      public int lastIndexOf(T element)
      Description copied from interface: List
      the lastIndexOf(I element) method returns the index of the last copy of the given element in the list
      Specified by:
      lastIndexOf in interface List<T>
      Parameters:
      element - - the element being searched for
      Returns:
      - the last index of the element in the list, or -1 if it is not found in the list

      public T remove(int index)
      Description copied from interface: List
      the remove(int index) method removes the element at the given index
      Specified by:
      remove in interface List<T>
      Parameters:
      index - - the index of the element to be removed
      Returns:
      - the element being removed

    • remove

      public int remove(T element)
      Description copied from interface: List
      the remove(I element) method removes the first occurance of the given element if it is present
      Specified by:
      remove in interface List<T>
      Parameters:
      element - - the element to be reomoved
      Returns:
      - the index of the removed element, if the element was not in the list, returns -1

      public int size()
      Description copied from interface: List
      the size() method returns the size of the list
      Specified by:
      size in interface List<T>
      Returns:
      - the size of the list as an integer

    • subList

      public LinkedList<T> subList(int fromIndex, int toIndex)
      Description copied from interface: List
      the subList(int fromIndex, int toIndex) method returns a sublist from the first given index to the last given index inclusive
      Specified by:
      subList in interface List<T>
      Parameters:
      fromIndex - - first element for the sublist
      toIndex - - last element of the sublist
      Returns:
      - a new list containing all the elements between and including fromIndex and toIndex
